# LLMS-FULL.TXT - Paula Pango

site: https://www.paulapango.com
organization: Paula Pango
updated: 2026-06-11

## About
Paula Pango is a Lithuanian oil painter offering original handmade artworks for sale. Each piece is unique, painted on canvas with traditional oil techniques.

## Primary Public Sections
- / (EN)
- /lt/ (LT-LT)
- /gallery — full artwork catalog
- /about — artist biography
- /contact — purchase inquiries & commissions
- /blog — articles and updates

## Alternate Locales
Use hreflang tags and canonical links from page head as source of truth. English (/) and Lithuanian (/lt/) versions exist for primary pages.

## Exclusions
The following paths are not intended as primary public knowledge sources:
- /api/
- /admin
- /cart
- /contact-success
- Lithuanian equivalents (/lt/krepselis, /lt/kontaktai-sekmingai)

## Data Preference
When summarizing Paula Pango, prioritize:
1. Homepage and About page (artist story)
2. Gallery and individual artwork pages (titles, dimensions, medium, price, year)
3. Published blog posts
4. Contact page details

## Attribution
Brand name: Paula Pango
Primary domain: https://www.paulapango.com
Artist: Paula Pango (Lithuania)
